creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Ed Maste from comment #2)

Thanks, some commentary at <https://old.reddit.com/r/freebsd/comments/oqwcdt/-/>. 

Generally (defocusing from The FreeBSD Foundation post): for what it's worth, I shouldn't attempt to include a compatibility table in the FreeBSD Handbook.
